name: VeriWorkly Agent Card
description: VeriWorkly is a developer-focused, privacy-first ecosystem for building and managing professional ATS-friendly resumes. This agent card provides discovery information for AI agents to interact with our platform, API, and documentation.

api.auth_details: Web clients authenticate using Better Auth via Email OTP, establishing a session cookie ('better-auth.session_token'). Programmatic agents must use API Keys as Bearer tokens.

services.name: Main Site
services.description: Landing page, marketing hub, and public roadmap tracker.

services.name: Resume Studio
services.description: Interactive, local-first web application for building, previewing, and exporting resumes.

services.name: Documentation
services.description: Comprehensive technical guides, integration tutorials, and API reference.

services.name: Blog
services.description: Articles on career advice, product updates, and open-source engineering.

services.name: API Service
services.description: Backend services powering document synchronization, analytics, and public sharing.

capabilities.name: Manage Documents
capabilities.description: Create, read, update, and delete individual resume documents.

capabilities.name: Public Sharing
capabilities.description: Generate and revoke secure public tokens for sharing resumes.

capabilities.name: Master Profile Management
capabilities.description: Manage a central profile to seed multiple resumes efficiently.

capabilities.name: API Key Management
capabilities.description: Create, rotate, and revoke programmatic access tokens.

capabilities.name: System & Metrics
capabilities.description: Access public roadmap progress and GitHub repository statistics.

compliance.data_storage: Local-first by default (in-browser), optional cloud sync to PostgreSQL.
